commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Say now to the rebellious house, Know you not what these things mean. tell them, Behold, the king of Babylon has come to Jerusalem, and has taken its king, and its princes, and led them with him to Babylon; Shall, or, "hath taken", (Challoner) as also (ver. ) Sedecias was seized five years after, chap. Jechonias, the princes, mighty warriors, (ver. ) and expert artists, had been taken away six years before, with the prophet. Protestants, "is come. And hath taken "(Haydock).
